name: editFile
description: Apply a targeted text replacement. Token-efficient. Supports exact string (default) or Regex (isRegex=true). Fails safely if 0 matches found.
intent: edit a file in place by replacing text
examples: Edit src/index.ts to change the import path
Replace all TODO: with DONE: in notes.md
Use a regex to rewrite function signatures across the file
whenToUse: The user wants to change a specific span of text inside an existing file.
A small, surgical update is preferred over rewriting the whole file.
Either exact-string or regex matching identifies the target span.
whenNotToUse: The user wants to create a brand new file or fully replace an existing one. Use writeFile instead.
The change touches many files at once; consider grep then-file editFile.
The user only wants to read the file. Use readFile instead.

filePath.description: Relative path to the target file

oldText.description: Exact text snippet OR Regex pattern (if isRegex=true) to find

newText.description: Replacement text. Supports $1, $2 captures if isRegex=true

replaceAll.description: If true, replaces all exact matches. Default: false (fails safely on multiple exact matches). Ignored if isRegex=true (regex always replaces all).

isRegex.description: Set to true if oldText is a Regex pattern. Enables bulk replacement and capture groups. Default: false.
